parsedJson.summary: The site has credible branding and a strong roofing image, but the mobile first screen hides the phone action and includes a visible builder watermark that weakens trust.

issues.title: Mobile phone action is hidden
issues.what_observed: On the mobile screenshot, the first screen shows the logo, hamburger icon, headline, and intro text, but no visible phone button or booking button before the fold.
issues.why_problem: A local customer searching for roofing on their phone is often trying to call quickly. If the phone number is not visible immediately, they may go back to Google and call the next roofer.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Mobile header with the logo on the left, a tap-to-call button or phone icon on the right, and a primary call button visible within the first screen.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Add a sticky mobile header with a visible phone icon linked to 07 5230 8868, and place a full-width 'Call Now' button directly under the hero headline.
issues.plain_explanation: 手机打开时，客户第一眼看不到电话号码或拨打按钮。
issues.customer_impact: 本地找屋顶维修的人多数会用手机搜索；如果8秒内找不到怎么联系，很可能直接返回Google点下一家公司。

issues.title: Builder watermark hurts credibility
issues.what_observed: A black 'Made with Manus' badge appears in the bottom-right of the desktop screenshot and overlays the bottom of the mobile hero text.
issues.why_problem: The badge makes the site feel unfinished or template-generated. For roofing work, customers need to feel they are dealing with a real established trade business, not a draft website.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: No third-party builder badge visible anywhere on the live customer-facing site, especially near calls to action or service copy.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Remove the Manus watermark from the published site and ensure no external builder branding appears on desktop or mobile.
issues.plain_explanation: 网页右下角还露着建站工具的标志，看起来像还没正式做完。
issues.customer_impact: 屋顶维修是高信任服务，客户看到这种标志会怀疑公司是否专业，可能少打一个电话就损失一个报价机会。

issues.title: Mobile headline consumes the screen
issues.what_observed: On mobile, the headline 'Trusted Since 1992. Roof Tile Supplies & Services.' takes most of the visible screen before any contact action appears.
issues.why_problem: The oversized headline delays the practical next step. A visitor can understand the business but still has to scroll before they can act.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A mobile hero with a shorter headline in roughly 34-42px type, a one-line trust statement, and a call button visible without scrolling.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Reduce mobile hero typography, tighten the headline to 'Gold Coast Roof Tiling Since 1992', and move the primary phone button above the intro paragraph.
issues.plain_explanation: 手机上的大标题太占地方，重要的联系方式被挤到下面去了。
issues.customer_impact: 客户不是来欣赏标题的，他们想快速确认能不能修屋顶并打电话；每多滚动一步都会减少一部分来电。

issues.title: Logo is repeated in hero
issues.what_observed: Both desktop and mobile screenshots show the GC Roof Tiling Solutions logo in the header and again as a large logo inside the hero area.
issues.why_problem: Repeating the same logo uses valuable first-screen space that could show stronger proof, services, or a clear phone action.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: One logo in the header only, with the hero area reserved for the main offer, service proof, and call-to-action buttons.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Remove the large duplicate hero logo and replace it with a compact trust row such as 'Licensed & insured', '34+ years', and 'Gold Coast roof tile specialists'.
issues.plain_explanation: 同一个Logo出现了两次，占用了首页最宝贵的位置。
issues.customer_impact: 首屏空间有限，重复Logo不能帮客户决定打电话；换成资质、年限和服务范围更能促成咨询。

issues.title: Desktop contact choices feel busy
issues.what_observed: On desktop, the main action area has four separate boxes: 'Book: 07 5230 8868', 'Office: 07 5564 5370', email, and 'Our Services'.
issues.why_problem: Too many similar-looking choices make visitors pause and wonder which one they should use. Local service visitors usually need one obvious next action.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: One dominant filled call button, one secondary quote or services button, and supporting contact details placed below in smaller text.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Make 'Call 07 5230 8868' the single primary CTA, turn 'Our Services' into a secondary outline button, and move office/email details into a compact contact strip.
issues.plain_explanation: 桌面版有太多联系按钮，客户会犹豫到底该点哪一个。
issues.customer_impact: 选择越多，行动越慢；本地服务客户通常只需要一个最明显的电话按钮，否则可能直接离开。

issues.title: Hero image dominates desktop
issues.what_observed: On desktop, the right half is a large roof worker image, while the left side contains the sales message and buttons.
issues.why_problem: The image is relevant and useful, but it takes half the first screen while the action buttons sit lower on the left. Some visitors may notice the photo before the phone number.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A balanced hero where the trade photo supports the message, while the phone CTA remains visually dominant and close to the headline.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Keep the roof image but slightly reduce its visual weight, bring the primary call button closer to the headline, and use the image as proof rather than the main focal point.
issues.plain_explanation: 图片很好，但现在太抢眼，联系方式没有图片那么突出。
issues.customer_impact: 图片能建立信任，但电话按钮才带来询盘；如果客户先看图后找不到行动入口，来电会减少。

positive_observations: The roof worker image is relevant and immediately shows the trade being offered.
The 'Trusted Since 1992' message is a strong trust signal worth keeping.
The desktop header includes visible phone numbers, which helps credibility.
redesign_priorities: 1. Add a visible mobile tap-to-call button above the fold.
2. Remove the Manus watermark from all live pages.
3. Simplify the hero so one primary phone CTA is visually dominant.
